name: Decodo
description: Decodo (formerly Smartproxy) Public API for residential proxy subscriptions, users, endpoint generation, IP allowlists, and usage statistics. Datacenter and ISP plans are not supported by this public API; mobile plans support only statistics endpoints.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Public API key
credential_fields.description: Create a Decodo Public API key under Dashboard > Account and Settings > Settings > API Keys. Send the key as-is, without a Bearer prefix.

tools.name: get_subscriptions
tools.description: Get current residential subscription limits, dates, user capacity, and traffic allocation.

tools.name: get_endpoint_types
tools.description: List endpoint types available for residential proxies, such as random and sticky.

tools.name: get_endpoints_by_type
tools.description: List Decodo-managed proxy endpoints for one residential endpoint type.

tools.name: generate_proxy_endpoints
tools.description: Generate ready-to-use residential back-connect proxy URLs from a proxy user's username/password. These are proxy credentials, not the Public API key. Use random sessions for per-request rotation or sticky with session_time.

state.description: US state with underscores instead of spaces.

city.description: Lowercase city with underscores instead of spaces.

domain.description: Usually gate.decodo.com; use ip to supply an explicit host:port.

tools.name: list_sub_users
tools.description: List active residential proxy users and their traffic limits.

tools.name: get_sub_user
tools.description: Get one active residential proxy user by numeric ID.

tools.name: create_sub_user
tools.description: Create a residential proxy user. The password must be at least 12 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and one of _ ~ + =; @ and : are invalid.

tools.name: update_sub_user
tools.description: Update password, traffic limit, counting date, status, or auto-disable behavior for a residential proxy user.

tools.name: delete_sub_user
tools.description: Delete a residential proxy user. Their proxy credentials stop working immediately.

tools.name: get_allocated_traffic
tools.description: Get total traffic allocated across residential sub-users.

tools.name: get_sub_user_traffic
tools.description: Get one residential sub-user's usage for an optional date range and aggregation type.

tools.name: list_whitelisted_ips
tools.description: List source IPs authorized for residential proxy access.

tools.name: add_whitelisted_ips
tools.description: Add one or more source IP addresses to the residential proxy allowlist.

tools.name: delete_whitelisted_ip
tools.description: Delete an authorized source IP entry by its Decodo allowlist ID.

tools.name: get_traffic_statistics
tools.description: Get usage, requests, response time, and success metrics for up to 180 days. Supports residential, mobile, and Decodo scraping products.

endDate.description: UTC YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS; maximum interval 180 days.

tools.name: get_target_statistics
tools.description: List target domains accessed during a UTC range of up to 180 days, optionally filtered by user or search text.
